settings.heading: Street meets intention.
settings.subheading: Premium streetwear crafted in India. Luxury fabrics, precise detailing, and construction built to be worn and remembered.

settings.heading: Not fast fashion. Built to last.
settings.description: Every piece is cut from 240 GSM premium cotton, double-stitched at stress points, and designed to hold its shape through hundreds of washes. We don't chase trends — we build wardrobe anchors.
settings.card_text: From structured shoulders to drop-cut hems — every silhouette is designed for comfort without compromising on form.
settings.quote_text: Zariya pieces feel like they were made just for me. The weight, the fit, the detailing — nothing else compares at this price.

settings.heading: Our promise of excellence.
settings.text: Every Zariya piece is crafted with uncompromising attention to detail — premium materials, precise craftsmanship, and refined design.

settings.heading: Heavyweight & tactile.
settings.text: 240 GSM cotton fleece, structured silhouettes, and defined shoulders. Built to hold shape and feel luxury across the day.

settings.heading: Built on trust. Defined by craft.
settings.text: Consistency, quality, and customer trust. Trusted by customers who value authenticity and durability in every piece.

settings.support_text: Browse the line, place an order, or reach out for sizing help and order support.

settings.question: How fast do you ship?
settings.answer: Most orders are prepared within 24-48 hours and dispatched with tracking. Delivery typically takes 4-7 business days depending on your location.

settings.question: Can I exchange sizes?
settings.answer: Yes. Reach out via WhatsApp or email within 7 days of delivery and we'll sort your exchange quickly. Items must be unworn with tags attached.

settings.question: What areas do you deliver to?
settings.answer: We deliver across India with free shipping on orders above ₹999. International shipping is available on request — reach out to our support team for details.

settings.question: What fabric do you use?
settings.answer: We use 240 GSM premium cotton fleece for our hoodies and heavyweight cotton for tees. Every fabric is pre-shrunk, bio-washed for softness, and built to hold shape wash after wash.

settings.question: How do I find my size?
settings.answer: Each product page has a detailed size chart. If you're between sizes, we recommend going one size up for a relaxed fit. Feel free to DM us on Instagram or WhatsApp for personalized sizing help.

settings.question: Are your drops limited edition?
settings.answer: Yes. Each collection is produced in limited quantities. Once a drop sells out, it's gone. Follow us on Instagram @zariya.wear to be the first to know about new releases.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer hassle-free returns within 7 days of delivery. Items should be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.
